_header.file_role: E2 wave-2 observation evidence index — raw pulls from official training logs (tier T2), accessed 2026-07-17

olmo2_wandb.pointer: OLMo-2 paper (arXiv:2501.00656) 'WandB Logs' footnote -> https://api.wandb.ai/links/ai2-llm/fjn0v0ec -> public project ai2-llm/OLMo-2-1124-7B
olmo2_wandb.metric_key: train/CrossEntropyLoss (summary = last logged); Z-loss logged separately (weight 1e-5, ~2.6e-4, excluded from CE)

pythia_wandb.pointer: EleutherAI/pythia README line 73: 'The loss curves for all models are contained in our (messy!) wandb project' -> https://wandb.ai/eleutherai/pythia

runs.1p4b_corroboration: https://wandb.ai/eleutherai/pythia/runs/3bj0rp1k (bs512 replication, 286000 steps x 512 x 2048 = same 299.9B tokens, 1.96507)

pythia_wandb.metric_key: train/lm_loss (final-checkpoint loss on train split; validation/test logged alongside)

smollm3_search.tier: T2 attempted — NO official final loss found
checked: HF blog https://huggingface.co/blog/smollm3 (no loss figure/number; states 'We will also share our training logs')
Smol Training Playbook https://huggingface.co/spaces/HuggingFaceTB/smol-training-playbook + public chart data (ablation curves <= 100B tokens only)
WandB public probes (huggingface/HuggingFaceTB orgs: no public smollm3 project)
HF dataset search smollm3/logs/trackio (no training-log dataset as of 2026-07-17)
smollm3_search.partial_official_curve: smollm3_mainrun_first_724B_tokens_loss.csv — official main-run lm_loss for first 7.24e11 tokens only (playbook chart data, run elie-48n-1004-part1, GBS 2.36M matches SmolLM3); insufficient for an 11.2e12-token endpoint read

files.wandb_evidence.json: raw summary/config pulls for the 5 cited WandB runs
files.pythia_eval_sweep_scan.json: full 42-run scan of pythia project runs carrying final loss trios (anti-cherry-picking audit)
files.smollm3_mainrun_first_724B_tokens_loss.c: official early-segment main-run loss curve (see smollm3_search.partial_official_curve)
